category.scope_note: Electric bicycle (e-bike / EPAC pedelec) compliance comparison — China GB standards to EU CE / EN 15194 requirements.

title.zh: 中国电动自行车进入欧盟：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動自行車進入歐盟：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of Chinese e-bike GB standards (GB 17761-2018, GB/T 36972, GB 42295/42296) against EU CE requirements: EN 15194:2017 EPAC safety, battery EN 50604-1, EMC Directive 2014/30/EU, Regulation (EU) 168/2013 type-approval boundary for >250W vehicles, REACH, and the General Product Safety Regulation.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动自行车GB标准（GB 17761-2018、GB/T 36972、GB 42295/42296）与欧盟CE要求对比：EN 15194:2017 EPAC安全、电池EN 50604-1、EMC指令2014/30/EU、>250W车辆依据法规(EU) 168/2013的型式认证边界、REACH法规及通用产品安全法规。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動自行車GB標準（GB 17761-2018、GB/T 36972、GB 42295/42296）與歐盟CE要求對比：EN 15194:2017 EPAC安全、電池EN 50604-1、EMC指令2014/30/EU、>250W車輛依據法規(EU) 168/2013的型式認證邊界、REACH法規及通用產品安全法規。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, notified-body assessment, type-approval determination, customs classification, or market-access approval. The EU regulatory framework for e-bikes depends critically on the vehicle's motor power and speed: vehicles ≤250W/25km/h follow the EN 15194 / Machinery Directive CE path; vehicles above those limits require full type-approval under Regulation (EU) 168/2013. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current EU law, harmonised standards, battery regulation timelines, and member-state road rules with qualified EU legal and technical professionals before shipment or sale.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、公告机构评审、型式认证裁定、海关分类或市场准入批准。欧盟电动自行车监管框架在很大程度上取决于车辆的电机功率和速度：≤250W/25km/h的车辆遵循EN 15194/机械指令CE路径；超过上述限值的车辆须依据法规(EU) 168/2013进行完整型式认证。出口商、进口商和分销商在出货或销售前，应与具备资质的欧盟法律及技术专业人士核验现行欧盟法律、协调标准、电池法规时间表及成员国道路规则。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、公告機構評審、型式認證裁定、海關分類或市場准入批准。歐盟電動自行車監管框架在很大程度上取決於車輛的電機功率和速度：≤250W/25km/h的車輛遵循EN 15194/機械指令CE路徑；超過上述限值的車輛須依據法規(EU) 168/2013進行完整型式認證。出口商、進口商和分銷商在出貨或銷售前，應與具備資質的歐盟法律及技術專業人士核驗現行歐盟法律、協調標準、電池法規時間表及成員國道路規則。

answer_first.en: Pedelec e-bikes ≤250W/25km/h need CE marking under EN 15194:2017 (Machinery Directive); Chinese motors rated 251–400W trigger full EU type-approval under Regulation (EU) 168/2013 (L1e-A) — the critical export-blocking gap.
answer_first.zh: ≤250W/25km/h的助力电动自行车须依据EN 15194:2017（机械指令）取得CE标志；额定功率251-400W的中国电机将触发法规(EU) 168/2013（L1e-A类）的完整欧盟型式认证要求——这是阻碍出口的关键差距。
answer_first.zht: ≤250W/25km/h的助力電動自行車須依據EN 15194:2017（機械指令）取得CE標誌；額定功率251-400W的中國電機將觸發法規(EU) 168/2013（L1e-A類）的完整歐盟型式認證要求——這是阻礙出口的關鍵差距。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, notified body, EU type-approval authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs, secondary summaries, and law firm blogs are not accepted as primary sources.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
